health_zone_table.basis: SitRep37 Table 2 (20 June 2026) visually reviewed against the INSP PDF and reconciled to Table 1/province totals 1003/254. No new affected health zone is reported; the affected-zone count remains 34/104. The table carries 17 Ituri cases in zones not yet identified; these remain an unventilated residual and are not distributed to named health zones. PDF sha256 389770d734cea7353cadb5317daf761e49f7ba79cc5f69fb6b2bf681aba80e38.

reconciliation.note: Rows promoted here reconcile to official province/national totals: 986 named confirmed cases plus 17 Ituri cases awaiting ventilation; all 254 confirmed deaths are named-zone attributed. The residual row is retained as unventilated context and excluded from mappable named-zone attribution.

lab_indicators_24h.note: National aggregate from SitRep37 section 4.3: Ituri 119 collected/analyzed / 42 positive; Nord-Kivu 39 collected/analyzed / 5 positive; Sud-Kivu 5 collected/analyzed / 0 positive. Positivity uses 47 positives over 163 analyzed samples.

care_continuity: End-of-day isolation stood at 365 patients (163 confirmed, 202 suspected) at 82.8% occupancy.
Ituri isolation occupancy was 89.3% with 302 patients isolated at end day; Nord-Kivu was 73.2% with 52 and Sud-Kivu 34.4% with 11.
Six suspect/confirmed patients escaped during the cycle; 8 recovered exits were recorded.
highlights: 47 new confirmed cases including 7 confirmed deaths were reported for 2026-06-20.
New confirmed cases were reported in Ituri (42 including 4 deaths) and Nord-Kivu (5 including 3 deaths), led by Bunia (16), Mongbwalu (11), and Rwampara (10).
8 patients were declared recovered after negative control tests, bringing DRC cumulative recoveries to 100.
laboratory: SitRep37 reports 163 samples collected and analyzed across Ituri, Nord-Kivu, and Sud-Kivu, with 47 positives.
Province laboratory positivity was Ituri 35.2% (42/119) and Nord-Kivu 12.8% (5/39); Sud-Kivu reported 5 samples, all negative.
publication_context: INSP SitRep 37 reports through 2026-06-20 and was published on the INSP WordPress site on 2026-06-22T14:08:23Z.
The outbreak remains reported across 3 provinces and 34 of 104 health zones; no new affected health zone is reported in this SitRep.
Ituri remains the epicenter with 916 of 1003 DRC confirmed cases (91.3%).
Nord-Kivu stands at 84 confirmed cases and keeps the highest provincial confirmed-case fatality ratio at 57.1%, led by Beni (70.6%), Katwa (60.7%), and Oicha (66.7%).
redactions: Page contact details and operational names, if present outside table facts, are intentionally not promoted into public evidence text.
surveillance: 840 alerts were reported and 839 investigated, producing a 99.9% investigation rate across the three reporting provinces.
201 suspected cases of the day were validated, including 30 deceased validated alerts.
7,913 contacts were under follow-up and 5,301 were seen, producing 67.0% follow-up coverage across reporting provinces.
171 new contacts were listed in nine Ituri zones: Rwampara, Mangala, Bunia, Nyankunde, Aungba, Aru, Mambasa, Nizi, and Mongbwalu.

alerts_total.data_gap_note: 171 new contacts were listed in nine Ituri health zones: Rwampara 54, Mangala 48, Bunia 23, Nyankunde 15, Aungba 15, Aru 5, Mambasa 4, Nizi 4, and Mongbwalu 3.

challenges.finding: Isolation occupancy reached 82.8% nationally, with Ituri at 89.3%.
challenges.response: Accelerate construction and expansion of CTE/isolation capacity, including additional temporary structures (a gap of about 20 centers is reported).

challenges.finding: Contact follow-up reached 67.0% versus the 95% target.
challenges.response: Train, deploy, and motivate community relays (RECO) with reinforced supervision.

challenges.finding: Seventeen Ituri confirmed cases remain not yet precisely ventilated by health zone.
challenges.response: Conduct data reconciliation, duplicate cleanup, field verification, and reclassification.

challenges.finding: SitRep37 challenge table reports 78 health-worker infections and 18 deaths (CFR 23.1%).
challenges.response: Reinforce IPC/WASH supplies (PPE, chlorine), supervision, and training.

contacts_total.data_gap_note: 171 new contacts were listed in nine Ituri health zones: Rwampara 54, Mangala 48, Bunia 23, Nyankunde 15, Aungba 15, Aru 5, Mambasa 4, Nizi 4, and Mongbwalu 3.

priorities.priority: Resolve the 17 unventilated Ituri confirmed cases without distributing them to named health zones
Protect Ituri isolation capacity as occupancy stays high (89.3%) and close the reported gap of about 20 isolation centers
Improve contact follow-up (67.0% vs 95% target) and investigate the Nord-Kivu Grand Nord expansion (Katwa, Butembo, Beni) and the Nord-Kivu laboratory backlog

preserved_conflicts: SitRep37 headline is DRC-only (1003 confirmed / 254 confirmed deaths across Ituri, Nord-Kivu, Sud-Kivu); the country-scope public snapshot adds the latest reviewed Uganda component separately.
SitRep37 carries an explicit Ituri residual of 17 confirmed cases in zones not yet identified; these counts are public but not mappable to named health zones.
Daily suspected cases (201) and the 30 deceased validated alerts are current-cycle validated alert outputs, not cumulative suspected stock or cumulative confirmed deaths.
The confirmed-count banner carries an asterisk noting DHIS2 cleaning/harmonization and consolidation; the DHIS2 weekly-notification analysis box cites n=933 included confirmed cases.
Uganda anchor updated to 20 cumulative confirmed cases per the Uganda MoH EVD daily dashboard through 2026-06-21, with 2 deaths and 11 recoveries.

review_notes: SitRep #037 (data cutoff/report date 2026-06-20; INSP WordPress post 25037 appeared 2026-06-22T14:08:23Z). PDF sha256 389770d734cea7353cadb5317daf761e49f7ba79cc5f69fb6b2bf681aba80e38, 11 pages.
DRC headline 1003 confirmed / 254 confirmed deaths; +47 confirmed and +7 confirmed deaths reported for 2026-06-20 (Ituri 42/4, Nord-Kivu 5/3).
The affected-zone count remains 34/104. No new affected health zone is reported, so no new map geometry/centroid is required this cycle.
Health-zone rows reconcile to 1003 confirmed / 254 deaths: 986 named confirmed cases plus 17 Ituri cases awaiting ventilation, with 254 named confirmed deaths and no death residual.

Recovered advanced to 100 DRC cumulative (+8). Uganda anchor updated to 20 cumulative cases (per the Uganda MoH EVD daily dashboard through 2026-06-21) with 2 deaths and 11 recoveries, so country-scope is 1023 confirmed / 256 deaths / 111 recovered.
Laboratory throughput promoted from section 4.3: 163 collected and analyzed, 47 positive (Ituri 42/119, Nord-Kivu 5/39, Sud-Kivu 0/5).

Operational data captured: 840 alerts (839 investigated, 99.9%), 201 suspected cases of the day (30 deceased validated alerts), 7,913 contacts under follow-up (67.0%), 365 in isolation (163 confirmed / 202 suspected, 82.8% occupancy), 171 new contacts in nine Ituri zones, PoC activation 80.0% (44/55) with 83,708 travelers passed in Ituri.

Geographic note: Nord-Kivu Grand Nord corridor expanded (Katwa 28, Butembo 27, Beni 17) with very high zone CFRs (Beni 70.6%, Katwa 60.7%); INSP flags possible rapid geographic expansion. Promoted as table facts only.
